$comment: Copilot (logancyang/obsidian-copilot) -> LOCAL Ollama, no cloud keys committed. Schema verified against src/constants.ts DEFAULT_SETTINGS + src/aiParams.ts CustomModel. Model key format is 'name|provider'. For Ollama: baseUrl MUST be the bare host with NO /v1, and enableCors:true routes via Obsidian's safeFetch (needed for http:// hosts). Only overrides are set here; blank API keys default to '' via merge. Requires: ollama pull llama3.1:8b  AND (for vault QA embeddings) ollama pull nomic-embed-text. To switch to a cloud provider later, add its API key IN THE APP (Settings -> Copilot), never in this repo, and change defaultModelKey.
